verses.text: <ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>儿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Jī</rt></ruby><ruby>督<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dū</rt></ruby><ruby>福<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fú</rt></ruby><ruby>音<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>起<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>头<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tóu</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>正<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Zhènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>如<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rú</rt></ruby><ruby>先<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiān</rt></ruby><ruby>知<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>赛<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sài</rt></ruby><ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yà</rt></ruby><ruby>书<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shū</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>记<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>着<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhe</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>（<ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>古<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>卷<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">juǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>无<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wú</rt></ruby>“<ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>赛<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sài</rt></ruby><ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yà</rt></ruby>”<ruby>三<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sān</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>字<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zì</rt></ruby>）：“<ruby>看<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Kàn</rt></ruby><ruby>哪<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nɑ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>差<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chāi</rt></ruby><ruby>遣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qiǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>使<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>者<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhě</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>前<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qián</rt></ruby><ruby>面<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">miɑn</rt></ruby>，<ruby>预<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yù</rt></ruby><ruby>备<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bèi</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>路<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lù</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Zài</rt></ruby><ruby>旷<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kuànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>野<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>声<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>喊<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>着<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhe</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：‘<ruby>预<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yù</rt></ruby><ruby>备<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bèi</rt></ruby><ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby>，<ruby>修<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiū</rt></ruby><ruby>直<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhí</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>路<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lù</rt></ruby>。’”

<ruby>照<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Zhào</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>话<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huà</rt></ruby>，<ruby>约<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yuē</rt></ruby><ruby>翰<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hàn</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">le</rt></ruby>，<ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>旷<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kuànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>野<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>施<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shī</rt></ruby><ruby>洗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>传<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chuán</rt></ruby><ruby>悔<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>改<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>洗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>礼<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>使<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>罪<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuì</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dé</rt></ruby><ruby>赦<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shè</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>犹<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yóu</rt></ruby><ruby>太<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tài</rt></ruby><ruby>全<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">quán</rt></ruby><ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>路<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lù</rt></ruby><ruby>撒<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sā</rt></ruby><ruby>冷<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lěnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qu</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>约<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yuē</rt></ruby><ruby>翰<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hàn</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">li</rt></ruby>，<ruby>承<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>认<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rèn</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>罪<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>约<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yuē</rt></ruby><ruby>旦<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dàn</rt></ruby><ruby>河<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">li</rt></ruby><ruby>受<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shòu</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>洗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xǐ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>约<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yuē</rt></ruby><ruby>翰<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hàn</rt></ruby><ruby>穿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chuān</rt></ruby><ruby>骆<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">luò</rt></ruby><ruby>驼<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tuo</rt></ruby><ruby>毛<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">máo</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>衣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>服<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fu</rt></ruby>，<ruby>腰<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yāo</rt></ruby><ruby>束<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shù</rt></ruby><ruby>皮<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pí</rt></ruby><ruby>带<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dài</rt></ruby>，<ruby>吃<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chī</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>蝗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>虫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chónɡ</rt></ruby>、<ruby>野<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>蜜<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mì</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>传<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chuán</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>位<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>后<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hòu</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>能<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>力<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>比<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>更<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dà</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>弯<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wān</rt></ruby><ruby>腰<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yāo</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>解<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiě</rt></ruby><ruby>鞋<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xié</rt></ruby><ruby>带<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dài</rt></ruby><ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>配<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pèi</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>用<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>水<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>施<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shī</rt></ruby><ruby>洗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>却<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">què</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>用<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>圣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>灵<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">línɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>施<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shī</rt></ruby><ruby>洗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xǐ</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Nà</rt></ruby><ruby>时<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shí</rt></ruby>，<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>加<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Jiā</rt></ruby><ruby>利<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>利<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>拿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Ná</rt></ruby><ruby>撒<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sā</rt></ruby><ruby>勒<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lè</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lái</rt></ruby>，<ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>约<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yuē</rt></ruby><ruby>旦<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dàn</rt></ruby><ruby>河<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">li</rt></ruby><ruby>受<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shòu</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">le</rt></ruby><ruby>约<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yuē</rt></ruby><ruby>翰<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hàn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>洗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xǐ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>水<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">li</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lɑi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>看<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kàn</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiɑn</rt></ruby><ruby>天<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tiān</rt></ruby><ruby>裂<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">liè</rt></ruby><ruby>开<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kāi</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">le</rt></ruby>，<ruby>圣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>灵<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">línɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>仿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>佛<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fú</rt></ruby><ruby>鸽<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡē</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>降<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>身<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shēn</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>又<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>声<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>音<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>天<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tiān</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lɑi</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>爱<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ài</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>喜<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>悦<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yuè</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby>！”

<ruby>圣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Shènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>灵<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">línɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>把<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>催<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cuī</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>旷<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kuànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>野<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qù</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>旷<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kuànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>野<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>四<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sì</rt></ruby><ruby>十<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>天<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tiān</rt></ruby><ruby>受<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shòu</rt></ruby><ruby>撒<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sā</rt></ruby><ruby>但<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dàn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>试<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>探<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tɑn</rt></ruby>，<ruby>并<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>野<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>兽<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shòu</rt></ruby><ruby>同<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>处<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chù</rt></ruby>，<ruby>且<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qiě</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>天<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tiān</rt></ruby><ruby>使<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>伺<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cì</rt></ruby><ruby>候<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hou</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby>。<ruby>呼<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">hū</rt></ruby><ruby>召<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">zhào</rt></ruby><ruby>门<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">mén</rt></ruby><ruby>徒<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">tú</rt></ruby>

<ruby>约<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yuē</rt></ruby><ruby>翰<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hàn</rt></ruby><ruby>下<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xià</rt></ruby><ruby>监<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiān</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>后<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hòu</rt></ruby>，<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>加<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Jiā</rt></ruby><ruby>利<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>利<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>宣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xuān</rt></ruby><ruby>传<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chuán</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>福<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fú</rt></ruby><ruby>音<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yīn</rt></ruby>，

<ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>日<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Rì</rt></ruby><ruby>期<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qī</rt></ruby><ruby>满<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">le</rt></ruby>，<ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>国<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡuó</rt></ruby><ruby>近<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jìn</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">le</rt></ruby>！<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>当<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>悔<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>改<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡǎi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>信<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xìn</rt></ruby><ruby>福<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fú</rt></ruby><ruby>音<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yīn</rt></ruby>。”

“<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>听<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>啊<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɑ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>撒<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>种<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhǒnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qu</rt></ruby><ruby>撒<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>种<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhǒnɡ</rt></ruby>。

“<ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>耳<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ěr</rt></ruby><ruby>可<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kě</rt></ruby><ruby>听<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>应<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>当<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>听<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tīnɡ</rt></ruby>。”）

<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>离<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lí</rt></ruby><ruby>开<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kāi</rt></ruby><ruby>众<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby>，<ruby>进<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jìn</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">le</rt></ruby><ruby>屋<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wū</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>门<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mén</rt></ruby><ruby>徒<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tú</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>问<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèn</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>比<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>喻<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yù</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>意<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yì</rt></ruby><ruby>思<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">si</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>对<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">duì</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>样<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>明<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>白<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bɑi</rt></ruby><ruby>吗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mɑ</rt></ruby>？<ruby>岂<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Qǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>晓<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dé</rt></ruby><ruby>凡<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fán</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>外<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wài</rt></ruby><ruby>面<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">miɑn</rt></ruby><ruby>进<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jìn</rt></ruby><ruby>入<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rù</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>能<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>污<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wū</rt></ruby><ruby>秽<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huì</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby>，

<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>入<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rù</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xīn</rt></ruby>，<ruby>乃<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>入<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rù</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>肚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dù</rt></ruby><ruby>腹<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fù</rt></ruby>，<ruby>又<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>落<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">luò</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>茅<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">máo</rt></ruby><ruby>厕<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">si</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby>。<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>，<ruby>各<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>样<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>食<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>物<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wù</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>洁<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jié</rt></ruby><ruby>净<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>又<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>面<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">miàn</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lɑi</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>才<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cái</rt></ruby><ruby>能<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>污<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wū</rt></ruby><ruby>秽<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huì</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby>，

<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>面<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">miàn</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">li</rt></ruby><ruby>发<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fā</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>恶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">è</rt></ruby><ruby>念<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">niàn</rt></ruby>、<ruby>苟<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>合<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby>、

<ruby>偷<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tōu</rt></ruby><ruby>盗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby>、<ruby>凶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>杀<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shā</rt></ruby>、<ruby>奸<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiān</rt></ruby><ruby>淫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yín</rt></ruby>、<ruby>贪<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tān</rt></ruby><ruby>婪<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lán</rt></ruby>、<ruby>邪<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xié</rt></ruby><ruby>恶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">è</rt></ruby>、<ruby>诡<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>诈<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhà</rt></ruby>、<ruby>淫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yín</rt></ruby><ruby>荡<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dànɡ</rt></ruby>、<ruby>嫉<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jí</rt></ruby><ruby>妒<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dù</rt></ruby>、<ruby>谤<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby class="CharOverride-1">讟<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dú</rt></ruby>、<ruby>骄<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiāo</rt></ruby><ruby>傲<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ào</rt></ruby>、<ruby>狂<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kuánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>妄<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wànɡ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>切<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qiè</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>恶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">è</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>面<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">miàn</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lɑi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>且<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qiě</rt></ruby><ruby>能<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>污<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wū</rt></ruby><ruby>秽<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huì</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby>。”<ruby>叙<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">Xù</rt></ruby><ruby>利<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>非<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">fēi</rt></ruby><ruby>尼<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">ní</rt></ruby><ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">jī</rt></ruby><ruby>妇<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">de</rt></ruby><ruby>信<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">xìn</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">xīn</rt></ruby>

<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">li</rt></ruby><ruby>起<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>身<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shēn</rt></ruby>，<ruby>往<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>推<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Tuī</rt></ruby><ruby>罗<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">luó</rt></ruby>、<ruby>西<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Xī</rt></ruby><ruby>顿<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dùn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>境<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>内<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nèi</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qù</rt></ruby>，<ruby>进<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jìn</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">le</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>家<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiā</rt></ruby>，<ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>愿<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yuàn</rt></ruby><ruby>意<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yi</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>知<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dɑo</rt></ruby>，<ruby>却<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">què</rt></ruby><ruby>隐<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǐn</rt></ruby><ruby>藏<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>住<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhù</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>当<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Dānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>下<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xià</rt></ruby>，<ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>妇<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby>，<ruby>她<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>小<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>女<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǚ</rt></ruby><ruby>儿<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>被<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bèi</rt></ruby><ruby>污<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wū</rt></ruby><ruby>鬼<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡuǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>附<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>着<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhe</rt></ruby>，<ruby>听<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiɑn</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>事<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>俯<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>伏<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fú</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>脚<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>前<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qián</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>妇<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>希<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Xī</rt></ruby><ruby>腊<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">là</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby>，<ruby>属<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>叙<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Xù</rt></ruby><ruby>利<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>腓<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">féi</rt></ruby><ruby>尼<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ní</rt></ruby><ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jī</rt></ruby><ruby>族<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zú</rt></ruby>。<ruby>她<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>求<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qiú</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>赶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>鬼<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡuǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>离<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lí</rt></ruby><ruby>开<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kāi</rt></ruby><ruby>她<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>女<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǚ</rt></ruby><ruby>儿<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ér</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>对<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">duì</rt></ruby><ruby>她<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>让<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Rànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>儿<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>女<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǚ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>先<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiān</rt></ruby><ruby>吃<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chī</rt></ruby><ruby>饱<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bǎo</rt></ruby>，<ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>好<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>拿<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ná</rt></ruby><ruby>儿<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>女<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǚ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>饼<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bǐnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>丢<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">diū</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>狗<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>吃<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chī</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>妇<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Fù</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>回<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huí</rt></ruby><ruby>答<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dá</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>啊<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɑ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>错<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cuò</rt></ruby>，<ruby>但<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dàn</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>狗<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>桌<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhuō</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>底<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>下<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiɑ</rt></ruby><ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>吃<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chī</rt></ruby><ruby>孩<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hái</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>碎<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">suì</rt></ruby><ruby>渣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhā</rt></ruby><ruby>儿<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">er</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>她<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>回<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huí</rt></ruby><ruby>家<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiā</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qù</rt></ruby>，<ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>小<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>孩<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hái</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>躺<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>床<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chuánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>鬼<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡuǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>已<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>经<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jinɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qu</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">le</rt></ruby>。<ruby>医<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>治<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">zhì</rt></ruby><ruby>耳<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">ěr</rt></ruby><ruby>聋<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">lónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>舌<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">shé</rt></ruby><ruby>结<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">jié</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">de</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">rén</rt></ruby>

于Yú是shì，叫jiào众zhònɡ人rén和hé门mén徒tú来lái，对duì他tā们men说shuō：“若Ruò有yǒu人rén要yào跟ɡēn从cónɡ我wǒ，就jiù当dānɡ舍shě己jǐ，背bēi起qǐ他tā的de十shí字zì架jià，来lái跟ɡēn从cónɡ我wǒ。

<ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Rén</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>赚<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhuàn</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dé</rt></ruby><ruby>全<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">quán</rt></ruby><ruby>世<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>界<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiè</rt></ruby>，<ruby>赔<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">péi</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>自<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zì</rt></ruby><ruby>己<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>生<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>命<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mìnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>什<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shén</rt></ruby><ruby>么<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">me</rt></ruby><ruby>益<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yì</rt></ruby><ruby>处<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chù</rt></ruby><ruby>呢<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ne</rt></ruby>？

<ruby>过<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Guò</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">le</rt></ruby><ruby>六<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">liù</rt></ruby><ruby>天<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tiān</rt></ruby>，<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>带<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dài</rt></ruby><ruby>着<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhe</rt></ruby><ruby>彼<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Bǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dé</rt></ruby>、<ruby>雅<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>各<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡè</rt></ruby>、<ruby>约<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yuē</rt></ruby><ruby>翰<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hàn</rt></ruby><ruby>暗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">àn</rt></ruby><ruby>暗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">àn</rt></ruby><ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">le</rt></ruby><ruby>高<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡāo</rt></ruby><ruby>山<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shān</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>面<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">miàn</rt></ruby><ruby>前<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qián</rt></ruby><ruby>变<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">biàn</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">le</rt></ruby><ruby>形<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>像<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiànɡ</rt></ruby>：

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>离<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lí</rt></ruby><ruby>开<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kāi</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>方<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fɑnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>经<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>过<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡuò</rt></ruby><ruby>加<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Jiā</rt></ruby><ruby>利<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>利<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>愿<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yuàn</rt></ruby><ruby>意<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yi</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>知<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dɑo</rt></ruby>。
于Yú是shì教jiào训xun门mén徒tú，说shuō：“人Rén子zǐ将jiānɡ要yào被bèi交jiāo在zài人rén手shǒu里li，他tā们men要yào杀shā害hài他tā，被bèi杀shā以yǐ后hòu，过ɡuò三sān天tiān他tā要yào复fù活huó。”

<ruby>门<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Mén</rt></ruby><ruby>徒<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tú</rt></ruby><ruby>却<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">què</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>明<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>白<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bɑi</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>话<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huà</rt></ruby>，<ruby>又<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>敢<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>问<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèn</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby>。<ruby>对<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">duì</rt></ruby><ruby>门<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">mén</rt></ruby><ruby>徒<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">tú</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">de</rt></ruby><ruby>教<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>训<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">xun</rt></ruby>

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>迦<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Jiā</rt></ruby><ruby>百<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>农<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nónɡ</rt></ruby>。<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>屋<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wū</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">li</rt></ruby><ruby>问<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèn</rt></ruby><ruby>门<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mén</rt></ruby><ruby>徒<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tú</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>路<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lù</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>议<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yì</rt></ruby><ruby>论<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lùn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>什<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shén</rt></ruby><ruby>么<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">me</rt></ruby>？”

<ruby>门<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Mén</rt></ruby><ruby>徒<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tú</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>声<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shēnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>路<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lù</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>彼<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>此<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>争<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>论<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lùn</rt></ruby><ruby>谁<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuí</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dà</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>坐<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>下<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xià</rt></ruby>，<ruby>叫<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>十<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>二<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">èr</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>门<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mén</rt></ruby><ruby>徒<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tú</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lái</rt></ruby>，<ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>若<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Ruò</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>愿<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yuàn</rt></ruby><ruby>意<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yi</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>首<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>先<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiān</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>必<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bì</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>众<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>末<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mò</rt></ruby><ruby>后<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hòu</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>众<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>用<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ren</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>于<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yú</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>领<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lǐnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>过<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡuò</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>小<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>孩<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hái</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lái</rt></ruby>，<ruby>叫<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>站<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhàn</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>门<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mén</rt></ruby><ruby>徒<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tú</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>间<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiān</rt></ruby>，<ruby>又<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>抱<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bào</rt></ruby><ruby>起<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lái</rt></ruby>，<ruby>对<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">duì</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：

“<ruby>凡<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Fán</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>名<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>接<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiē</rt></ruby><ruby>待<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dāi</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>像<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>小<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>孩<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hái</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>接<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiē</rt></ruby><ruby>待<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dài</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby>；<ruby>凡<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fán</rt></ruby><ruby>接<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiē</rt></ruby><ruby>待<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dài</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>接<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiē</rt></ruby><ruby>待<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dài</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>乃<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>接<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiē</rt></ruby><ruby>待<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dài</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>差<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chāi</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>约<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yuē</rt></ruby><ruby>翰<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hàn</rt></ruby><ruby>对<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">duì</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>夫<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Fū</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>看<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kàn</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiɑn</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>奉<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>名<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>赶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>鬼<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡuǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>禁<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jìn</rt></ruby><ruby>止<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby>，<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>跟<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡēn</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Bú</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>禁<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jìn</rt></ruby><ruby>止<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby>，<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>没<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">méi</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>奉<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>名<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>异<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yì</rt></ruby><ruby>能<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nénɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>反<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>倒<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>轻<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>易<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yi</rt></ruby><ruby>毁<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>谤<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>但<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dàn</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>起<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>初<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>创<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chuànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>造<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zào</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby><ruby>时<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>候<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hou</rt></ruby>，<ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>造<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zào</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>造<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zào</rt></ruby><ruby>男<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nán</rt></ruby><ruby>造<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zào</rt></ruby><ruby>女<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nǚ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>此<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">cǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>离<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lí</rt></ruby><ruby>开<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">kāi</rt></ruby><ruby>父<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>母<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">mǔ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>妻<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qī</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>连<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lián</rt></ruby><ruby>合<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hé</rt></ruby>，<ruby>二<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">èr</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>成<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>体<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tǐ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>配<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">pèi</rt></ruby><ruby>合<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>可<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">kě</rt></ruby><ruby>分<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fēn</rt></ruby><ruby>开<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">kāi</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Dào</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">le</rt></ruby><ruby>屋<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wū</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">li</rt></ruby>，<ruby>门<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">mén</rt></ruby><ruby>徒<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tú</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>问<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wèn</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>事<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>实<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>告<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡào</rt></ruby><ruby>诉<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">su</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby>：<ruby>凡<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fán</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>承<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>受<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shòu</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>国<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡuó</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>若<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ruò</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>像<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>小<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>孩<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hái</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>断<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">duàn</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>能<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>进<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jìn</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qu</rt></ruby>。”

彼Bǐ得dé又yòu不bù承chénɡ认rèn。过Guò了le不bù多duō的de时shí候hou，旁pánɡ边biān站zhàn着zhe的de人rén又yòu对duì彼bǐ得dé说shuō：“你Nǐ真zhēn是shì他tā们men一yī党dǎnɡ的de！因Yīn为wèi你nǐ是shì加Jiā利lì利lì人rén。”

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>带<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dài</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">le</rt></ruby><ruby>各<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Gè</rt></ruby><ruby>各<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>方<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fɑnɡ</rt></ruby>（<ruby>各<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>各<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>翻<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">fān</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lɑi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>髑<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dú</rt></ruby><ruby>髅<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lóu</rt></ruby><ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dì</rt></ruby>），
